step.name: gather-schema
step.action: Run `terraform init -backend=false && terraform providers schema -json > schema.json`.

step.name: parse-iac
step.action: Parse HCL with `hcl2json` (or Pulumi AST) into a resource graph.

step.name: validate
step.action: For each resource: lookup type. For each attribute: lookup in schema. For each module: lookup source.

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Verdict=fail if any present (excluding `skipped`). Post to PR.
